summary: Comprehensive testing of Aqbobek ACS V2 features. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing completed successfully - all new V2 features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 ribbon strategies (split, parallel_level, cross_class, merge) implemented correctly with Strategy pattern
Ribbon validation properly detects conflicts: same teacher in 2 groups, same room, same student, teacher busy in schedule
Substitution workflow correctly implements Request→Pending→Confirmed/Rejected with candidate rotation
AI Task Estimation via Groq working (returns minutes 10-240)
Admin overrides (clear day/week) properly restricted to director role
Audit log correctly filters by entity type
All new endpoints properly enforce role-based access (403 for non-directors)
seed_data_creation: Schedule re-seeded with 58 rows after clear_week test
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 features fully tested: Ribbons (4 strategies with validation), Substitution workflow (request/decide/pending_for_me), AI Task Estimation, Task Placement, Admin Overrides (clear day/week), Audit Log with entity filter. Frontend pages tested: /ribbons (empty state, create modal, validate conflicts), /audit (filter pills, table), /schedule (clear week button, hover buttons for substitute/delete), /cabinet (SubstitutionInbox widget with accept/reject). Sidebar shows 9 items for director including Ленты and Журнал.

ribbons.get_strategies: PASS - returns 4 strategies: split, parallel_level, cross_class, merge
ribbons.create_valid: PASS - creates ribbon with groups, includes teacher_name

substitutions.request: PASS - creates pending substitution with candidate
substitutions.pending_for_me: PASS - returns pending list for candidate teacher

ai_tasks.estimate_duration: PASS - returns minutes via Groq (10-240 range)

task_placement.place_task: PASS - finds open window and updates scheduled_day/time

admin_overrides.clear_day: PASS - deletes lessons for specified day

audit_log.filter_by_entity: PASS - filters correctly by entity type

frontend_pages.sidebar_9_items: PASS - director sees 9 items including Ленты and Журнал
frontend_pages.ribbons_page: PASS - empty state, create modal with strategy/day/time/classes, 2 default groups, validate button works
frontend_pages.audit_page: PASS - filter pills (все/schedule/ribbon/substitution/task), table with 5 columns
frontend_pages.schedule_page: PASS - clear week button, hover shows UserX and Trash buttons
frontend_pages.teacher_cabinet: PASS - SubstitutionInbox widget shows pending requests with accept/reject buttons
